hero.headline: Visual editing with vanilla server islands

items.name: Zero JS in production
items.description: Pages stay statically rendered. The bridge only loads inside the editor iframe.

items.name: Per-island refresh
items.description: Edits trigger a refetch of just the marked island, not a full page reload.

items.name: Stateless overlay
items.description: Unsaved data flows through the X-Tina-Preview header. No backend changes needed.
